about.keywords: digital health, Rwanda, telemedicine, online doctors, hospitals, pharmacies
about.title: About e-Ivuze
about.paragraph1: e-Ivuze is Rwanda's leading digital health platform, built to connect patients, doctors, hospitals and pharmacies in one simple, trusted experience.
about.visionHeading: Making quality healthcare simple, safe and accessible for everyone
about.paragraph2: We believe that no one should have to wait in long queues or travel across the city just to ask a medical question or book a visit. Thatâ€™s why we bring appointments, medical records, payments and followâ€‘up care into one secure digital experience.
about.visionText: By partnering with hospitals, clinics, laboratories and pharmacies across Rwanda, we are building a connected health system that puts people first â€“ helping families find the right care faster and helping providers focus on what matters most: patients.

feature1.title: One platform for all your care
feature1.desc: Book consultations, manage upcoming visits, access prescriptions and connect with your care team without moving between different apps or paper files.

feature2.title: Trusted doctors and hospitals
feature2.desc: We work with licensed doctors and accredited health facilities so you can feel confident about the quality and safety of the care you receive.

feature3.title: Designed for Rwandan families
feature3.desc: From city hospitals to district clinics, we support providers across the country with tools that respect local context, languages and community needs.

about.valuesHeading: Our commitment to patients and partners
about.paragraph3: We are committed to privacy, dignity and transparency in every interaction. Our team works closely with clinicians and health institutions to ensure that technology supports â€“ not replaces â€“ the human relationships at the heart of care.

doctors.heroDescriptionSpeciality: Find trusted {{speciality}} specialists in Rwanda. Book appointments with verified doctors, read patient reviews, and get care when you need it.
doctors.heroDescriptionAll: Connect with Rwanda's trusted healthcare professionals. Find specialists across all medical fields, from general practitioners to specialized surgeons.

contact.keywords: contact e-Ivuze, healthcare support, Kigali Rwanda, medical consultation contact, telemedicine Rwanda
contact.hero: We're here to guide your care journey
contact.careersText: We're always looking for passionate healthcare professionals to join our mission of transforming healthcare in Rwanda.

cards.title: One Platform, Complete Care
cards.description: Book appointments, access records, manage prescriptions, and communicate with your care team - all from one secure platform.

cards.title: Nationwide Network
cards.description: Connect with healthcare providers across Rwanda, from Kigali's top hospitals to district clinics serving rural communities.

cards.title: Patient-First Design
cards.description: Built by healthcare professionals for real patients. Simple, secure, and designed to put your health journey first.

cards.title: Quality You Can Trust
cards.description: Every provider is verified, every record is secure, and every interaction is guided by Rwanda's healthcare standards.

bullets: Instant appointment booking with confirmed availability
Secure access to your complete medical history
Direct messaging with your care providers
Multi-language support in English and Kinyarwanda
features.title: PLATFORM FEATURES
features.heading: Healthcare Simplified for Rwanda
features.intro: e-Ivuze brings modern healthcare technology to Rwanda, making it easier for families to find care, manage health, and stay connected with trusted providers.

bullets: State-of-the-art telemedicine infrastructure connecting rural clinics to urban specialists
AI-powered diagnostic assistance for faster, more accurate care decisions
Comprehensive patient records accessible across all healthcare providers
24/7 emergency coordination between hospitals and ambulance services
Mobile health units serving remote communities throughout Rwanda
Real-time health monitoring and chronic disease management programs
Multi-language support ensuring clear communication across all services
Quality assurance systems maintaining the highest standards of care delivery
gallery.title: Transforming Healthcare Across Rwanda
gallery.description: From telemedicine consultations to emergency response coordination, see how e-Ivuze is revolutionizing healthcare delivery across Rwanda's diverse landscape and communities.

testimonials.title: PATIENT FEEDBACK
testimonials.heading: What families are saying
testimonials.subheading: Real stories from patients who use e-Ivuze to get trusted care faster.

items.quote: I found a doctor quickly and the booking process was smooth. The support team followed up and made me feel safe.
items.name: Mukamana Aline
items.title: Parent

items.quote: Even while at work, I was able to get medical guidance without wasting time in queues. It's simple and reliable.
items.name: Niyonzima Eric
items.title: Patient

items.quote: Seeing my appointment details and updates in one place made everything easier. The platform truly saves time.
items.name: Uwamahoro Chantal
items.title: Patient

items.quote: They listened to me and explained clearly what to do next. The follow-up after the consultation was impressive.
items.name: Habimana Jean Claude
items.title: Patient
